summary: The walk in wardrobe appears newly decorated and generally very clean, with white painted walls/ceiling and light grey carpet present to the floor. The fitted wardrobes and internal doors appear in good order overall, with only minor cosmetic marks noted to the painted surfaces and carpet. No significant damage is visible in the photos.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth painted ceiling in white, with recessed lighting visible at the perimeter of the room.

items.name: Walls
items.description: Smooth painted walls in white and light neutral tones, forming the walk in wardrobe enclosure.
defects: light scuffing and faint marks mid level to wall surface

items.name: Skirting boards
items.description: White painted skirting boards fitted around the room perimeter and at wardrobe recesses.

items.name: Flooring - carpet
items.description: Light grey fitted carpet laid to the wardrobe area and adjoining circulation space.
defects: visible shading and pile compression across the carpet surface
pronounced flattened wear to central areas
localised darkened marks mid level to floor surface

items.name: Flooring - wood effect
items.description: Light oak-effect laminate flooring visible beyond the carpet threshold in the adjoining area/doorway.

items.name: Door
items.description: White painted hinged internal doors forming the wardrobe entrance and adjacent access doors.
defects: small chip/mark low level to door leaf
minor surface scuffs to lower door areas

items.name: Door frame and architrave
items.description: White painted door frames and architraves around the wardrobe and adjoining door openings.

items.name: Threshold strip
items.description: Metal threshold strip visible between the carpeted wardrobe area and the adjoining wood-effect flooring.

items.name: Door stops
items.description: Black floor-mounted door stops visible near the door bases.

items.name: Door handles and latches
items.description: Black contemporary lever handles with escutcheons and latch keeps fitted to the internal doors.

items.name: Wardrobes - fitted storage units
items.description: Fitted wardrobes with wood-effect external finish and white internal doors/panels; includes overhead storage compartments and hanging rails.
defects: minor cosmetic wear to lower panel edges

items.name: Shelving
items.description: Internal wardrobe shelf/overhead storage shelf in wood-effect finish.

items.name: Hanging rails
items.description: Metal hanging rails fitted within the wardrobes.

items.name: Hangers
items.description: Assorted plastic clothes hangers, predominantly pink/white, left in the wardrobe.

items.name: Light switches
items.description: Black wall-mounted switch plates visible in the room and adjacent hall area.
